metadata.description: vllm serving Qwen3.6-35B-A3B (Intel int4-mixed AutoRound/GPTQ) on Strix Halo

recipe.name: qwen3-6-35b-a3b-int4-mixed-autoround
recipe.description: vllm serving Qwen3.6-35B-A3B (Intel int4-mixed AutoRound/GPTQ) on Strix Halo
recipe.command:
vllm serve /models/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-int4-mixed-AutoRound \
  --served-model-name qwen36-int4-mixed \
  --host 0.0.0.0 --port {port} \
  --trust-remote-code \
  --dtype float16 \
  --max-model-len 8192 \
  --max-num-seqs {nseq} \
  --max-num-batched-tokens 8192 \
  --gpu-memory-utilization 0.85 \
  --attention-backend TRITON_ATTN \
  --mm-encoder-attn-backend TRITON_ATTN \
  --quantization gptq

meta.command: vllm serve /models/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-int4-mixed-AutoRound \ --served-model-name qwen36-int4-mixed \ --host 0.0.0.0 --port {port} \ --trust-remote-code \ --dtype float16 \ --max-model-len 8192 \ --max-num-seqs {nseq} \ --max-num-batched-tokens 8192 \ --gpu-memory-utilization 0.85 \ --attention-backend TRITON_ATTN \ --mm-encoder-attn-backend TRITON_ATTN \ --quantization gptq
